# programs.xonsh

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `programs.xonsh`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `programs.xonsh.bashCompletion.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable bash completions for xonsh. |
| `programs.xonsh.bashCompletion.package` | `package` | The bash-completion package to use. |
| `programs.xonsh.config` | `strings concatenated with "\n"` | Extra text added to the end of `/etc/xonsh/xonshrc`, the system-wide control file for xonsh. |
| `programs.xonsh.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to configure xonsh as an interactive shell. |
| `programs.xonsh.extraPackages` | `(function that evaluates to a(n) list of package) or (list of package) convertible to it` | Xontribs and extra Python packages to be available in xonsh. |
| `programs.xonsh.package` | `package` | The xonsh package to use. The argument `extraPackages` of this package will be overridden by the option `programs.xonsh.extraPackages`. |
